audience: Personal trading review and disciplined execution
oneLiner: Trading dashboards built to keep research, live signals, and execution discipline aligned.
problemPoints: When markets get noisy, research, live inputs, and execution rules drift apart.
Without one disciplined view, it gets too easy to react instead of follow the system.
solutionPoints: The workflow is split into live, comparison, review, and audit views.
A written policy keeps every screen tied to process, not impulse.

features.title: Live dashboard
features.detail: Current call, live inputs, feed health, and guardrails in one readout.

features.title: Comparison view
features.detail: Shows what is fundable, not just what posted the prettiest CAGR.

features.title: Review and audit
features.detail: Reframes the strategy like a real memo and checks whether extra complexity is earning its keep.

metrics.label: Routes
metrics.detail: Live, comparison, review, audit, JSON, and home views are exposed directly.

metrics.label: OOS tests
metrics.detail: Ten out-of-sample windows keep the story grounded in live plausibility.

metrics.label: Core mix
metrics.detail: SPY stays the anchor while G plus stays capped as an overlay.

ctaBody: The best explainer feels simple because the process is.

cues.text:
Vol Dashboard Codex keeps research,
live signals, and execution discipline aligned.

When markets get noisy,
process drift is the real risk.
So this suite makes the workflow easier to read.
Review and audit show what earns trust.

The live screen pulls VIX,
SVIX, and term structure into one view.
The comparison view keeps the story on sizing and risk.

The policy keeps the dashboards tied to process,
not temptation.

Six routes. Ten out-of-sample tests.
A capped ninety-ten structure.

That makes the system easier to explain,
and easier to trust.

Clear inputs. Visible guardrails.
Decisions you can reproduce later.

title.title: One decision flow
title.detail: Research, live context, and guardrails stay in one lane.

problemSolution.title: Fight drift
problemSolution.detail: Keep the system from sliding into ad hoc calls.

features.title: See the workflow fast
features.detail: Each screen does one job, so the story stays clear.

metrics.title: Keep it fundable
metrics.detail: The evidence is visible on screen.

outro.title: Clear. Tight. Reproducible.
outro.detail: Trust comes from a flow people can follow.

title.title: Live decision dashboard
title.detail: Current call, feed health, and guardrails in one screen.

metrics.title: Fundable over flashy
metrics.detail: The story favors disciplined portfolio construction over backtest theater.
